author: sadegh.shokatian
name: 11L + XSA + PartialRoPE + LN Scale + EMA + Late QAT + TTT + TrigramHash + Adaptive Quant
blurb: 11 layers with XSA on last 4 layers, partial RoPE (16/64 dims), LN scale damping, EMA (0.997), late QAT with STE int6/int5 fake-quantization, backward-looking TTT (3-epoch SGD), TrigramHash embedding, gradient-guided adaptive int5/int6/int7 quantization, sliding window eval stride=32, SmearGate + BigramHash(10240) + OrthoInit + Muon WD=0.04 + zstd-22.
